channel.title: Chemex on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Chemex on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Pour Over Coffee Technique: Ratio, Grind, Time, and Pour — The Complete Methodology
item.description: The pour over methodology — the 4 knobs (ratio, grind, time, pour pattern), diagnostic table by taste, the 4-phase pour protocol, equipment-specific timings for V60, Chemex, Kalita, Origami, and the 30-day calibration plan.

item.title: Pour Over Coffee: Chemex and V60 Recipes, Bloom Technique, and Complete Brewing Guide
item.description: Master pour over coffee with step-by-step Chemex and V60 recipes, the coffee bloom technique, grind size charts, ratio guides, and troubleshooting tips.
